description: Coarse OOXML vocabulary and XLSX parser/writer coverage inventory. This manifest is a contract map, not a declaration-by-declaration completeness claim.

rows.parser_writer: typed parser and typed writer with package-fidelity diagnostics for unsupported children
rows.notes: Workbook structure is regenerated from typed state; raw workbook core replay is not the support contract.

rows.feature: worksheet root, dimensions, views, sheet properties
rows.parser_writer: typed parser and writer with targeted sidecars
rows.notes: Worksheet/view extension payloads are owner-scoped and must be invalidated on conflicting edits.

rows.parser_writer: typed style import/export plus extension-list preservation where owner policy allows
rows.notes: Shared ExtensionList is a storage helper, not blanket edit-safe extLst support.

rows.parser_writer: typed rich-text parser and shared-string writer
rows.notes: SST root extensions do not force SST part emission unless classified safe by the owner.

rows.parser_writer: typed comments plus VML/threaded sidecar handling
rows.notes: Relationship-bearing legacy payloads require package graph validation.
XML map bindings are not generic opaque table support.

rows.parser_writer: typed records with security-sensitive export policy
rows.notes: Active refresh behavior and credentials are policy-gated.

rows.parser_writer: partial typed model and package diagnostics
rows.notes: Unsupported metadata subtrees are owner-bound, not whole-part correctness support.

rows.parser_writer: typed table/cache records with preservation policy
rows.notes: Cache export is valid only when source binding and identity remain valid.

rows.parser_writer: typed chart model plus opaque package preservation for unedited imports
rows.notes: Raw chart replay is package preservation, not support for every chart feature.

rows.parser_writer: package graph relationship closure where present
rows.notes: Preserved only as owner-scoped inert package content.

rows.feature: spreadsheet drawings anchors and object choices
rows.parser_writer: typed known objects plus opaque unknown direct object preservation
rows.notes: Opaque unknown objects replay only when anchor/group ownership and drawing relationships remain valid.

rows.feature: DrawingML geometry, fills, text, nonvisual properties
rows.parser_writer: curated vocabulary used by drawing/chart/theme code
rows.notes: Closed enum completeness is documented per enum, not as whole-schema coverage.

rows.parser_writer: legacy comments, form controls, and header/footer image paths only
rows.notes: ActiveX is not preserved by this coverage row.

rows.parser_writer: targeted controls/OLE handling with active-content drops
rows.notes: Active content requires a separate explicit security-reviewed feature.
Relationships are emitted from package graph records, not raw rels bytes.

rows.feature: sparklines, slicers, timelines, data validation and conditional formatting extensions
rows.parser_writer: targeted typed support and owner-local extension preservation
rows.notes: Extension URI precedence and dirty invalidation are owned by each feature writer.

rows.parser_writer: targeted branch selection and raw preservation for known drawing contexts
rows.notes: Unsupported MustUnderstand behavior is diagnosed rather than treated as semantic support.

rows.parser_writer: modeled relationship graph with deterministic id resolution
rows.notes: Opaque raw XML may reference only registered/remapped relationships.
